mapper.insert: insert into operation_log(operator_id, operator_name, operation_type, module_name, operation_desc, request_uri, request_method, request_param, success_flag, operation_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{operationType}, #{moduleName}, #{operationDesc}, #{requestUri}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestParam}, #{successFlag}, #{operationTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
